mnemonics.title: ML Process Steps
mnemonics.content: Please Do Prepare Materials More Effectively Daily - Problem Definition, Data Collection, Data Preparation, Model Selection, Model Training, Model Evaluation, Deployment

mnemonics.title: Types of ML
mnemonics.content: SURF - Supervised, Unsupervised, Reinforcement, (Semi-supervised is the combination)

mnemonics.title: ML Applications
mnemonics.content: FHR TCM - Finance, Healthcare, Retail, Transportation, Manufacturing, Communications, Marketing

mnemonics.title: Data Preparation Steps
mnemonics.content: CHESS - Cleaning, Handling missing data, Encoding, Scaling, Splitting
